_comment: Copy this file to ~/.substation/token-pool.json and fill in your own credentials. NEVER commit the real file.
_anthropic: OAuth tokens from a Claude Max/Pro subscription. Get one by logging into Claude Code (`claude setup-token`) or copy the token from ~/.claude/auth-profiles.json. Tokens start with sk-ant-oat.
_openai: ChatGPT Plus/Pro OAuth tokens. Run `node scripts/substation-auth chatgpt` — it opens a browser, runs the OAuth PKCE flow, and writes the entry here for you (including the refreshToken).
